narrative_beat: Close de sino antigo dourado com badalo balancando, luz dourada pulsante

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a large antique bronze-gold church bell hanging from a dark oak crossbeam, the clapper swinging and just striking the interior rim, visible vibration ripples in the metal, warm golden light pulsing outward from the point of impact
subject.focal_point: the clapper striking the bell rim with golden light pulse
subject.secondary: oak crossbeam with iron brackets, rope trailing down

environment.location: a dark bell tower interior with stone walls
environment.time_of_day: dim interior, light from the bell glow only
environment.atmosphere: sacred alarm, the bell rings for the last time

composition.foreground: golden bell dominating center frame in rich warm tones
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white stone tower walls fading upward into darkness

lighting.key_light: warm golden pulse radiating from the clapper strike point
lighting.fill_light: amber reflected light bouncing off stone walls
lighting.rim_light: gold edge on the bell rim and rope
lighting.shadow_quality: deep hard-edged shadows behind the bell

style.post_processing: halation around bell glow, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, bronze patina and verdigris visible on bell surface, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: alarm, urgency, the notification bell as sacred warning

symbolism.primary: the church bell as original notification — activate the alarm before it is too late
symbolism.secondary: vibration ripples as the message spreading outward

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only
tack-sharp focus on bell surface and clapper

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
